send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

You said I can make returns for store credit but I followed directions and it says item not eligible for returns?

Fashion Nova: I'm really sorry about this, and surely, this isn't the experience I want you to have. What item are you trying to return? All items ending in $.48 and .98, bodysuits, swimwear, undergarments, beauty products, cosmetics, accessories, and "Party Wear" (such as Halloween costumes) are considered final sale, non-returnable and cannot be returned for store credit. I hope this helps.
Ed Hardy love kills pants set blue
It's too big and XL is still not available after waiting
Fashion Nova: Thanks. Apologies, but that one is part of our final sale. It is excluded from returns or exchanges. Hope that clarifies it.

send_to_cs: Send to CS immediately if cx did not receive their order
Send to CS immediately for post purchase inquiries about the status of the mold, or issues with the molds
Send to CS for pricing inquiries
Send to CS if cx is looking for a more specific piece not available on the website
Send to CS if cx is asking for a code and we don't have one
escalate: No escalations for this client, send everything to CS
tone: Use Teeth instead of Pieces (e.g 8 teeth at the top)
templates: If the image is not coming through a second time, send Broken Image temp
For CUSTOM GRILLZ & ACCESSORIES INQUIRIES for models not available on the website use PS shortcut
For urgent concerns/delayed escalation response use PS shortcut
For delayed orders and the customer is frustrated use PS shortcut
For customer service use shortcut CS which has both the direct email/number
dos_and_donts: Do not use the order history as a reference to order status
If customers want to cancel their order always ask for the reason for cancellation
drive_to_purchase: Don't recommend pre-made grillz! Upsell to fitted and custom grillz
When recommending an item, let the cx know they can customize their order on the product page
When recommending an item, ask the cx if they are working with a budget
Use LFG shortcut to gather information and provide recommendations when cx ask about:

promotions.title: FLEURATTV2025
content: Share with NEW customers if their free shipping welcome code isn't working. Please note code will only work on first order $199+

escalate: ESC if cx wants their account name to be changed
ESC if cx complains that their order was canceled
If cx's ask when their order will arrive/estimated delivery date
➜  Ask what shipping method they selected at checkout
➜ If it's standard shipping use STS shortcut
➜ If they insist to know exactly when ESC
Cx gets a code for free shipping for the first purchase; you can escalate any issues after troubleshooting
tone: Don't thank the cx for the purchase, thank them for their continuous support
Don't ask the customer to contact the courier
drive_to_purchase: Don't D2P when the cx already made a purchase
promo_and_exclusions: Free shipping code is only valid for standard shipping
Standard shipping charge is usually ~ $20, if you see a charge higher than that, it means the method selected is NOT standard (create a mock cart to double-check)

conversation.message_text: Venus et Fleur: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

Venus et Fleur: Welcome to Venus et Fleur! I'm Megan, your personal concierge and we are excited to have you experience our Eternity® Blooms. I've arranged for Complimentary Standard Shipping on your first order with the code N796B45T. 

Discover our garden of Real Flowers That Last A Year: 
https://venusetfleur.attn.tv/a6RjU6YUXv4a
Venus et Fleur: Don't forget to save our contact information:

Venus et Fleur: Hello, I'm Campbell, your personal concierge at Venus et Fleur. I wanted to personally extend a warm welcome as you join our VIP list. Thank you for being a valued client and entrusting us to enrich the beauty of your special occasions.

Please do not hesitate to reach out to us for support, inquiries, or tailored recommendations. venusetfleur.attn.tv/aaKx5Qi_9Dyw .

Venus et Fleur: Carefully harvested at their peak from our farms in Ecuador and Japan, each floral undergoes a delicate preservation process, maintaining its natural beauty and scent for a year or longer. 

Please feel free to use my exclusive gift to you N796B45T at checkout for Complimentary Shipping on your first order of Eternity® blooms 
https://venusetfleur.attn.tv/abJ4XO_AT5CL 

- Megan

Venus et Fleur: Happy Lunar New Year! 🧧🏮 Step into the Year of the Horse with strength and prosperity. 💫 

Celebrate with Real Flowers That Last A Year. Shop now: venusetfleur.attn.tv/ay7viCP6LuCD
Hi, my order hasn't been delivered yet

Venus et Fleur: I'm sorry for the delay and any inconvenience this has caused. I understand how important it is to receive your order on time. What I'll do is check this with my team for you. 

Was this regarding order #1012752? If so, could you please confirm the email address used at checkout so we can proceed?
bosefjunior@hotmail.com
Venus et Fleur: Got it. I'll check this now with the team and get back to you as soon as I have a response. Please hang tight!

Venus et Fleur: Thanks for your patience! I just heard from the team, and we understand how important this is. Your recent Venus et Fleur order has been flagged for additional verification as part of our security measures.

To proceed, we kindly ask that you verify the four-digit number that appears after "VENUS ET FLEUR" on the transaction line in your bank or card statement. This information allows us to quickly confirm the purchase and continue processing your order.

Please reply within 48 hours with the requested verification. Once received, our team will promptly review the details and move forward.

If you have any further questions or need assistance, please don't hesitate to contact me. We're here to help!
Venus et Fleur: Thank you! I've passed this along to my team, and I'll let you know as soon as I have an update. Is there anything else that I can do for you today?
